description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service and variables DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_HOST, GITLAB_HOST, NGINX_IMAGE, PHPFPM_IMAGE, and REGISTRY. Define two stages: prepare and build. In the prepare stage add a job-composer-install job that runs on the composer image, executes "composer install", and saves the vendor/ directory as an artifact. In the build stage add a job-build-nginx-image job that depends on job-composer-install, runs a before_script "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $REGISTRY", then script commands "docker build --no-cache -f ./docker/nginx --tag $NGINX_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF --tag $NGINX_IMAGE:latest .", "docker push $NGINX_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF", "docker push $NGINX_IMAGE:latest", and an after_script "docker logout $REGISTRY". Also add a job-build-php-fpm-image job with the same login/logout steps, script commands "docker build --no-cache -f ./docker/php-fpm --tag $PHPFPM_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF --tag $PHPFPM_IMAGE:latest .", "docker push $PHPFPM_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF", "docker push $PHPFPM_IMAGE:latest", and it also depends on job-composer-install. All three jobs are limited to the master branch of the kube-laravel/hellolara project.
